description_long: This is a large, rectangular museum building with a striking facade covered in intricate, colorful murals depicting historical and cultural motifs. The upper portion of the structure is a massive block with detailed artwork on all visible sides, featuring symbols, figures, and geometric patterns. The lower section consists of a wide, flat-roofed base with a series of circular skylights and a prominent staircase leading to the main entrance. The building also features a walled courtyard or terrace area on one side, adorned with relief carvings. The windows on the lower level are arranged in a grid pattern, providing natural light to the interior. The overall appearance is monumental, with a blend of modernist architecture and indigenous artistic influences.
description: A monumental museum building with mural-covered facades, a flat roof, and a prominent staircase entrance, blending modernist and indigenous artistic styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main mural facade, central staircase, and the walled terrace area to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the mural block and the relief-carved wall of the terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying another large mural and the full width of the building's base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mural details and the grid-patterned windows on the lower level.
